name: Phase Boots
description: Boots that allow the wearer to travel between the ether.

abilities.name: Phase
abilities.description: Increases the wielder's movement speed, and grants them phased movement for a while. Cooldown: 8. Mana Cost: 0. Move Speed Bonus: 10%. Duration: 3. Move Speed Bonus: 20%. Grants even more movement speed, and greatly improves the turn rate if the wielder is melee.
